title: GoTo Turns Profitable in Q1 2025 as Fintech and On-Demand Units Surge
body: GoTo posts Rp393 billion adjusted EBITDA profit in Q1 2025, fueled by fintech and on-demand growth; shares rise 3.88% to Rp85.

title: BI Holds Benchmark Rate at 5.75%, Cuts Global Growth Forecast to 2.9%

title: Jakarta Downplays LG Pullout from $7.7B EV Project, Eyes New Partners
